title: MCA Descendants
description: Addon for MCA:Reborn. Adds the ability to respawn as your descendants while playing hardcore mode.
body:
![MCA Descendants Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d82ba4c44dc0aecf0f75dc6ef372be89d19e96d3.png)
## **DEPENDENCIES:**

-Requires MCA:Reborn for forge.

## **FEATURES:**

-Adds the ability to respawn as your offspring (and grandchildren)

-Can be configured to be hardcore only.

-Respawn as siblings (can be configured).

## **CREDITS:**

-Big thanks to the MCA:Reborn Team for making this mod possible

-Mod made by DannyFather
